message:
feat(fp-io): SqlConnection::quote_identifier overridable (br-2y7w / fd90.10)

Closes br-frankenpandas-2y7w (fd90.10). Adds quote_identifier as a backend-overridable trait method matching the parameter_marker precedent (each backend dialect can supply its own identifier-quoting policy).

- SqlConnection::quote_identifier(&self, ident: &str) -> Result<String, IoError>: default impl produces ANSI double-quote form ('"..."') with embedded '"' doubled per the existing escape policy. Rejects NUL-byte identifiers (security: prevents driver-layer C-string truncation attacks).
- rusqlite override delegates to the existing free fn quote_sql_ident — same behavior, but exposes the override surface so reviewers can audit it independently of the default.

Future PG backend keeps default (ANSI shared with SQLite); MySQL backend (fd90.11) overrides to backtick form; MSSQL would override to bracket form.

4 new unit tests cover: ANSI quoting on rusqlite, embedded-quote escaping on rusqlite, NUL-byte rejection on rusqlite, default-impl matches SQLite behavior on a stub that doesn't override. Existing default_capability_probes_are_conservative test extends to verify default quote_identifier.

rch: 251 fp-io tests pass (247 prior + 4 new), cargo check --workspace --all-targets clean, cargo clippy -p fp-io --all-targets -D warnings clean, ubs exit 0.

Phase 2 of fd90.10 — migrating call sites from the free quote_sql_ident to conn.quote_identifier — tracks as fd90.12.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
